title: DESNZ: special advisers' gifts, hospitality and meetings, July to September 2024
body: "The Department for Energy Security and Net Zero (DESNZ) publishes details of special advisers’ meetings with senior media figures and any gifts or hospitality they received on a quarterly basis.  This data is also available on data.gov.uk:   Special advisers’ gifts, hospitality, travel and meetings with external organisations   "
